summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for independent ready-for-maintainer PR inventory shard. No merge is recommended because no item has a complete merge preflight with resolved review-bot comments, clean Codex /review proof, current mergeability, and validation commands. Three PRs have plausible contributor-branch repair paths but no complete executable fix_artifact is safe from the provided artifacts, so those fix recommendations are downgraded to maintainer decisions. Two additional PRs require maintainer judgment; one security-sensitive linked ref is quarantined; linked message-send work is kept as a separate related follow-up.
